pages.text:
LendBridge Capital Corp.
Q3 2024 Performance Review

Period Ended: Q3 2024

LendBridge Capital Corp. provides working capital lines to SMEs across North America through a technology-enabled specialty
finance model.

Condensed Income Summary

| Item | Q3 2024 |
| --- | --- |
| Recognized Revenue | $10.8M |
| Interest Expense | ($3.0M) |
| Net Interest Margin | 8.9% |
| Fee & Ancillary Income | $0.8M |
| Gross Margin | 59% |
| Adjusted Operating Margin | 31% |

Credit Portfolio Indicators

| Metric | Q3 2024 |
| --- | --- |
| Total Loan Book (gross) | $274M |
| Active Borrowers | 1,250 |
| Average Loan Size | $75k |
| Net Charge-off Rate(LTM) | 3.9% |
| Balance Sheet Leverage | 2.9x |
| Senior Covenant Headroom | +125bps |
| Total Headcount | 169 |

Portfolio Sector Mix – Q3 2024

Adjusted Operating Margin of 31% in Q3 2024 reflects improved operating leverage as origination volumes grew without
proportional headcount additions. The margin metric was relabelled from 'Pre-Provision Operating Margin' to align with internal
management reporting conventions adopted in Q3.

* * *

_(1) Adjusted Operating Margin excludes loan loss provisions and non-recurring items; formerly 'Pre-Provision Operating Margin'._ _(2) Net Charge-off Rate is on a last-twelve-months (LTM) basis._ _(3) Fee & Ancillary Income includes origination fees, prepayment premiums, and treasury service charges._
